name: tmdb-mcp-server
description: MCP server for The Movie Database (TMDB) — search movies, TV, and people; full credits, ratings, trailers, images, recommendations, and region-aware streaming availability.

tmdb_api_key.title: TMDB API Read Access Token
tmdb_api_key.description: TMDB v4 API Read Access Token (JWT). Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer'. Create one at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api.

tmdb_language.title: Default Language
tmdb_language.description: Default response language as ISO 639-1, optionally with region (e.g. 'en-US'). Per-call language overrides it.

tmdb_default_region.title: Default Region
tmdb_default_region.description: Default ISO 3166-1 country hint (e.g. 'US') used in region-aware error messages.
